description: Style NoteMetal link embellishments never looked more stylish than in this strappy pair from catwalk. Tough straps with shiny metal detailing- what's not to love? This versatile pair can be worn in a zillion different ways. The best look we can think of is with a tonal pair of skinnies!Product DetailsBlue sandals with inter-looped straps with metal embellishments and a heel collar with a zipper closureSmooth footbed with branding embossed on the heelTextured rubber outsole with a heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3.5"
